data.title: Hyperliquid Hit by Major Exploit After Private Key Compromise
data.description:
Blockchain investigators from PeckShield revealed that attackers accessed a private key linked to Hyperliquid’s Hyperdrive lending protocol.
source: https://coindoo.com/hyperliquid-hit-by-major-exploit-after-private-key-compromise/

data.title: Lighter: The platform service interruption is due to technical problems caused by extremely high TPS, and user funds are safe.
data.description: Lighter officials posted on X that due to extremely high TPS over the past 12 hours, the platform experienced a service outage within the past hour. The team is working tirelessly to resolve the technical issue. A resolution is nearing completion, and user funds are safe, with no security or risk issues.

data.title: CZ: The "hunting of market maker Wintermute" is not true. We only provide trading tools.
data.description: Regarding the community rumor that "CZ participated in hunting Wintermute", Binance founder CZ responded on X: "I haven't read or heard (or thought of) the word "Wintermute" for several months. The last time I read this name was on X. It is not something I have in mind. Trading (as a profession) is not what I/we do. We provide trading tools for others. Don't believe false narratives."

data.title: ETH rebounded above 3800 USDT, narrowing its 24-hour decline to 12.64%.
data.description: OKX market data shows that ETH rebounded above 3800 USDT and is currently trading at 3800.31 USDT, narrowing its 24-hour decline to 12.64%. (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance)

data.title: OKX Star: Amidst today's market volatility, OKX's global risk control system remains stable
data.description: OKX CEO Star posted on X that amid today's market volatility, OKX's global risk control system is operating stably, the platform remains smooth and stable in all regions, and all system indicators are at normal levels.

data.title: The amount of liquidation on the Hyperliquid platform in the past 24 hours has exceeded US$10 billion, setting a new record high
data.description: Coinglass data shows that the amount of liquidated positions on the Hyperliquid platform has exceeded $10 billion in the past 24 hours, currently reaching $10.297 billion, of which $9.317 billion were from long positions and $980 million were from short positions. Furthermore, the total amount of liquidated positions across all exchanges in the past 24 hours reached $19.301 billion, with $16.808 billion from long positions and $2.493 billion from short positions.

data.title: Bitcoin Spot ETFs Experience Mixed Inflows and Outflows
data.description:
According to Foresight News, data from SoSoValue indicates that on October 10, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $4.5038 million.

The Bitcoin spot ETF with the highest single-day net inflow was Blackrock's IBIT, which recorded an inflow of $74.2134 million. The historical total net inflow for IBIT has reached $65.26 billion.

Conversely, the Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was Bitwise's BITB, which saw an outflow of $37.4488 million. BITB's historical total net inflow stands at $2.483 billion.

As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $158.965 billion, with an ETF net asset ratio of 6.98% compared to Bitcoin's total market capitalization. The cumulative historical net inflow has reached $62.77 billion.

data.title: Data: Bitmine's ETH holdings have a floating loss of approximately $1.93 billion, with an average purchase price of $4,535
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, as the price of ETH fell below $3,900, Bitmine, a publicly listed company, suffered a significant blow to its ETH holdings, currently facing a floating loss of approximately $1.93 billion. Currently, Bitmine holds 2,830,151 ETH, purchased at an average price of $4,535 with a total capital of $12.83 billion. Its current ETH holdings are valued at $10.9 billion.

data.title: The number of on-chain addresses on the Gate Layer has exceeded 45 million, a 95.7% surge in 24 hours.
data.description: Official data indicates that the Gate Layer ecosystem continues to expand. Driven by the launch of Gate Fun and Gate Perp DEX applications, the number of on-chain addresses has exceeded 45 million, a 95.7% surge in 24 hours, demonstrating a steady increase in on-chain activity. Gate Layer is reportedly a high-performance second-layer network independently developed by Gate. Leveraging LayerZero for multi-chain interoperability, Gate Layer supports cross-chain asset transfers with major public chains such as Ethereum, BSC, and Polygon. With a design philosophy of "low barrier to entry, high efficiency, and low cost," Gate Layer is committed to providing convenient on-chain services for users and developers.

data.title: JustLend DAO community releases JST repurchase and destruction proposal
data.description: JustLend DAO has published a JST buyback and burn proposal on the governance forum. This proposal aims to establish a more sustainable deflationary mechanism by optimizing the JST token's economic structure, enhancing governance efficiency, and long-term value. The proposal states that buybacks will primarily be funded by JustLend DAO's net revenue (including sTRX and SBM net revenue) and incremental revenue from the USDD multi-chain ecosystem once profits exceed $10 million. All buybacks will be transparently executed on-chain, and JST tokens received will be permanently destroyed to gradually reduce the circulating supply. Furthermore, the DAO plans to continue buybacks on a quarterly basis using incremental net revenue and provide regular public progress reports. Officials stated that this mechanism will further strengthen JST's governance and promote healthier and more resilient growth for the TRON ecosystem.

data.title: Gate has launched YBU perpetual contract trading
data.description: According to the official announcement, Gate has launched YBU perpetual contract trading (USDT settlement), supporting 1-10x leverage.

data.title: Two hacker addresses panic-sell ETH, losing $3.7 million
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, two hacker addresses sold 5,480 ETH worth $20.47 million, which they had previously purchased at a low price, during the market panic. Their previous purchase price was $3,735, resulting in a loss of $3.7 million.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: Prices of most high-quality altcoins will not return to liquidation lows in the short term
data.description: BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes posted on the X platform that market rumors suggest that automated liquidations of collateral associated with cross-margin positions on large centralized exchanges (CEXs) are responsible for the price plunges of many altcoins during this sell-off. The prices of many high-quality altcoins will not return to those low levels in the short term.

data.title: Crypto KOL Dachengzi: WBETH, BNSOL and other contract margins should not be read into spot trading pair prices, and the stampede decline could have been avoided
data.description: According to a post by crypto influencer Dachengzi in the community, he previously raised the issue of WBETH risk control during a Binance Square options livestream. His main point was: since Binance already allows WBETH and BNSOL to be used as contract margin, there's no need to use price indices from spot trading pairs; the exchange rate could simply be fixed at 1:1. The reasoning is simple—both assets are inherently Binance ecosystem assets, allowing Binance to mint and burn them. If any issues arise, a simple redemption cycle is all that's needed to mitigate the risk. Last night's "stampede-like" decline could have been completely avoided.

data.description: OKX market data shows that BTC has fallen below 113,000 USDT, currently trading at 112,984 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 6.62%. (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance)

data.title: Zerobase founder: Flash withdrawal is different from regular withdrawal, the latter requires 7 days to redeem
data.description: Zerobase founder Mirror Tang stated during a livestream on X Platform Space that the flash withdrawal event will not affect the previously scheduled 7-day redemption period. Furthermore, he stated that funds will continue to be added to the liquidity pool and reminded users to refrain from using the standard withdrawal function if they wish to withdraw funds, as these withdrawals require a 7-day redemption period.

data.title: B3, a consumer ecosystem, announced the launch of the ANY token airdrop program for its payment product Anyspend.
data.description: B3, the open consumer network on the Base chain, has officially announced that its Anyspend token, ANY, will be launched on October 11, 2025, and will be airdropped to early adopters. Five percent of the total airdropped tokens will be used as community rewards. Anyspend is a B3 payment product designed to facilitate easy on-chain and cross-chain transactions. B3 officials stated that 90% of Anyspend (ANY) tokens will be used for the community airdrop. The second quarter airdrop has also begun.

data.title: 7 Siblings borrowed $40 million from Aave to buy the bottom of ETH and has bought $5 million of ETH
data.description: According to on-chain data analyst Ember, 7 Siblings, an institution that has repeatedly bought ETH at the bottom after major price drops, has once again begun buying ETH at the bottom after today's plunge. They borrowed 40 million USDC from Aave and have spent 5 million USDC in the past hour to buy 1,326 ETH at $3,771. The institution has previously made substantial profits by buying ETH at the bottom after major price drops: on August 5th of last year, when ETH fell 15%, they bought 100,000 ETH at approximately $2,270; on April 7th of this year, when ETH fell 10%, they bought 25,000 ETH at approximately $1,700.

data.title: Venus: We are reviewing the WBETH de-anchoring and liquidation issue and will fairly evaluate the subsequent processing steps
data.description: Venus, a lending protocol within the BSC ecosystem, has officially announced that the team is aware of the WBETH price depegging issue, which resulted in some users being unexpectedly liquidated during this morning's price drop. The team is actively investigating the incident, reviewing affected accounts, and evaluating fair next steps. Meanwhile, officials are strengthening risk management and oracle protection measures to help prevent similar incidents in the future. WBETH reportedly depegged during this morning's extreme price drop, falling to as low as $430 (ETH to $3435). The WBETH/ETH exchange rate plummeted to 0.2 and is currently trading at 1.06. The WBETH price is currently trading at $4097 (ETH to $3840).
